violations.text: Allergen advisory statement on menu is not present. Allergen advisory statement is required to inform customers of their obligation to inform staff of any food allergies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Establishment does not have an active licensed RI Manager Certified In Food Safety. Application provided during time of inspection. Establishment has individual with food safety certificate. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2025
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. French onion soup was observed at 45-46 degrees Fahrenheit in 22 qt cambro. Food was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The following were observed in poor: -ceiling in walk-in cooler -floors in walk-in cooler -ceiling by cookline. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2026
